name: chart-line-default
visual_summary: The chart-line-default component is a basic line chart that displays trends over time. It consists of a static line graph with clear labels and can be used as a simple data visualization tool to show progress over a specific period. This component is useful for developers looking to add a straightforward line graph to their application.
generation_prompt:
